programme.title: Love Boat
programme.desc: Love Boat

programme.title: Daktari
programme.desc: Dr Tracy goes looking for a self-styled tribal healer he ran out of the area when he finds that the man has the antidote for the venom of a deadly spider that has just bitten Paula

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Stanleys evening at a singles bar ends with a murder and its up to Jonathan and Jennifer to find out who set him up

programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: Cagney and Lacey try to uncover the connection between 3 strangled women and an adult telephone line

programme.title: Starsky and Hutch
programme.desc: An investigation of a safe-blowing jewel heist and murder lead Starsky and Hutch to a childlike deaf mute resident of a halfway house for ex-cons overseen by a hard-bitten cigar-chomping priest

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: Hawke must save an old girlfriend from evil government agents

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Friday the 13th The Series

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: On this no-holds-barred season finale Matt and Lou have their final confrontation and the team loses a member Sonia and Lyndah head out with Ashley to repossess a hang-glider in what might turn out to be the last job the three do together Matt Sonia and Lyndah confront a team of shady astronomers who dont want to give up their van and when Froy Matt and Sonia take on a risky job on the bad side of town bullets fly and the life of one of the team hangs in the balance

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: On this premiere of Operation Repos brand new season Sonias rehabilitation from her gunshot wound takes a shocking turn The whole team runs into trouble on a job when they attempt to repossess a carnival ride from a group of wannabe carnies Froy and Matt wrangle with a gym owner and his hired muscle and Lou Froy and Sonia repo a truck from a protester in quite the revealing outfit

programme.title: Paroled to Die
programme.desc: Meline is taking money from his own bank to drill an oil well When he finds Doug Redferns bandana he has his gang rob his bank and uses the bandana to frame Doug When Doug is convicted but immediately paroled Meline has another plan that he thinks will put him away permanently

programme.title: TBH 134
programme.desc: TBH 134

programme.title: Munsters 134
programme.desc: Munsters 134

programme.title: Munsters 209
programme.desc: Munsters 209

programme.title: Addams Family 134
programme.desc: Addams Family 134

programme.title: Addams Family 133
programme.desc: Addams Family 133

programme.title: Real McCoys S02E10
programme.desc: Real McCoys S02E10

programme.title: Real McCoys S02E06
programme.desc: Real McCoys S02E06

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Eds having paternal feelings so he talks Wilbur into adopting a little pony as a son for him

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed volunteers to be shot into outer space

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A hired killer Lucas Cain is acquainted with to his disdain comes into town with a local and loathed bully being his target

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Because of a terrible drought the railroad has sent two men into North Fork to recruit workers But when a water-witch gives the people hope the railroad takes a different approach

programme.title: Gunsmoke S07E32 Chesters Indian
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S07E32 Chesters Indian

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss gets diverted by a hydrogen-filled balloon while a family friend robs the Virginia City bank

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: West and Gordon visit a town named Justice during Law and Order Week and find it the site for a convention of criminals

programme.title: What Waits Below
programme.desc: An army experiment in submarine communications falls foul of the deadly secret hidden deep within the cave system housing their transmitter

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A jittery airline heir Brett Cullen finds himself on a flight to hell Meanwhile a stewardess Lezlie Deane goes home with a charming passenger Ted Demers who may be too good to be true

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An insurance salesman murders an obnoxious tycoon to get his seductive wife and his fortune but later is blackmailed by a rival

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Amateur ventriloquist Billy Goldman learns that being a ventriloquist might not be the best career for him

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Lovely young invalid Meg Kinderly has to fend for herself after she gets trapped in her spacious family mansion with a vicious killer who has just wiped out most of her family and all of the servants But things arent that simple

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Reverend Nolan Powers is a fire and brimstone evangelist who has achieved tremendous fame wealth and power from his radio program thats broadcast on a national basis from his station WGOD A team of TV journalists do a story on Powers and his increasing popularity with the masses However a long-suppressed shameful secret from his dark family past threatens to destroy Powers and his current high profile status

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: While working as a grounds keeper on a large estate owned by a kindly old lady she is brutally murdered in her own home Both her granddaughter and granddaughters husband implicate Eric But Eric knows he didnt do it and knows who did

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric is kidnapped by a corrupt Southern politician who is dying of cancer and wants Eric to cure him and make him immortal by turning him into a werewolf

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A pop radio psychiatrist is horrified because one of her call-in listeners commits murder while she is on the air and Nick helps her get her confidence back

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A racist uses a cursed antique car radio to travel back to 1954 and tries to prevent the arrest and death of his father a member of the KKK

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The Boys go all out to try to help Parker win the attention of a very attractive Nurse hes infatuated with

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: The Colonels daughter visits from her all-girls school and the Colonel asks Sgt Carter to find her an escort so of course Gomer Pyle is the perfect choice - at least until her overly protective mother panics

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Sgt Carters platoon takes part in war games and Gomers naive ways cause more problems than Sgt Carter can handle Will Gomers actions get Carter the boot

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligans body conducts electricity after he is struck by lightning with a bowling ball in his hand But when The Professor tries to remove the bowling ball from Gilligans hand a second lightning strike makes him invisible

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways try to contact two astronauts in a space capsule orbiting over the island but they fail However they may get a second chance when an unmanned capsule they are trying to make contact with lands on the island

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When Grandpa and George MacMichael realize that their house painting contracts with the Sparkle Paint Company are a fraud they utilize a ruse to try to recover their money

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Envious Grandpa attempts to sabotage a camping trip arranged by Hank Johnson a generous neighbor who has become increasingly popular with Little Luke and his friends

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ runs afoul of Clearwaters power broker Jason T Rockman when he agrees to take Dr Winters and a group of her mental patients to a local carnival

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carol brings a French Poodle home from the pound and Mister Ed plans to get rid of Pierre as soon as possible

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur tries everything from hypnosis to psychiatry in order to cure Ed of his fear of heights

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: When Newkirk discovers a new radio-controlled tank that could win the war for Germany the allies want Hogan and the men to photograph the tank and then destroy it - but complications ensue during their mission

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Tiger a female underground agent is arrested while trying to document some secret German bases and is held in Paris for questioning So Hogan and LeBeau become stowaways aboard Klinks staff car and head for Paris to free her

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Virgil loses the 73 and McHale and The Crew must arrange for a replacement before they can take a weeks RR trip to New Caledonia

programme.title: WKRP 119
programme.desc: WKRP 119

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Woods ex-con brother comes to town in hopes of getting his High School diploma

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Merleen finds her calling by painting nudes--starting with husband Harlan

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: A headlining talented versatile illusionist and female impersonator is receiving bizarre death threats His manager says hes just over reacting When he reaches out to Dan Tanna for help Dan begins also to get death threats

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: When a prostitute is murdered one of Jennifers former sources asks her to investigate

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Dick realizes hes been resting on his laurels as a writer when all of his attempts to get a book published under the pen name Dwight Schmidlapp are met with rejection

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: A new waitress at the Minuteman Cafe comes between Larry Darryl and Darryl Meanwhile George protests Michaels decision to cancel the television stations reruns of Barnaby Jones

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Problems arise when a Marine pen pal Robin has been communicating with via mail for a while shows up thinking Polly is Robin since Robin sent him Pollys picture instead After Craig and Holowachuk overhear the two at the officers club they think Polly and the pen pal are running away together and set about trying to stop it

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A big-game hunter arrives on the island Upon learning there is nothing on the island to hunt he chooses instead to hunt one of the castaways--and he chooses Gilligan

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Teague asks Mitch and Ryan for help of the Knights Templar when they are faced with torture devices which are controlled with modern electronics by an Asian woman

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: After Froy bails him out from a Tijuana prison Matt is on the warpath and somebody needs to pay Is this just the end of their business or is it also the end of their friendship Then Lou and Sonia get an order for a typical vehicle repossession Theres only one problem it belongs to somebody who is like family to them

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The repo team is back! On the premiere episode of the summer season of Operation Repo Lou Matt Sonia Froy and Lyndah are back together and better than everalthough a secret meeting suggests trouble in paradise This week the team confronts a shady importexport warehouse filled with unpaid-for cars a pair of reckless rodeo gals and a cunning team of car thieves who dont even think twice before running off with the teams truck TV-PG-L

programme.title: Black Eagle
programme.desc: A CIA free-lancer Shô Kosugi takes his children and a baby sitter Doran Clark to Malta where he meets his KGB match Jean-Claude Van Damme

programme.title: Dark Night of the Scarecrow
programme.desc: In a small Southern town four vigilantes wrongfully execute a mentally-challenged man but after the court sets them free mysterious accidents begin to kill them off one by one

programme.title: The Dukes Hazzard
programme.desc: Boss gets Uncle Jesse to enter a contest for a new type of fossil fuel saying that moonshine is the perfect way to cut down on pollution However Boss has more up his sleeve He plans to tip off the authorities and once Jesse is arrested take credit for the idea himself

programme.title: Hercules 106
programme.desc: Hercules 106

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: A Jiridian probe headed for Earth is shot down by the Taelon Embassy and crashes outside of DC Liam recovers the probe but he Augur and Julia are captured by another underground resistance movement led by the real Colonel Liam Kincaid

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Suzanne does some unauthorized research on a new kind of grain that will grow in any climate The billionaire who invented wants to sell it to the world Thinking poorer countries will be given money by richer countries But the aliens have their own plans for the grain after placing a new deadly poison in the grain they take over the body of the billionaire who suddenly offers it free to the world

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Swamp Thing encounters Falco who has come to kill Dr Arcane for turning him from a bird into a man

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Space1999
programme.desc: While exploring an Earth-type world several Alphans including Commander Koenig and Dr Russel disappear after sighting a strange fog Shortly afterwards a race of primitive humans are encountered

programme.title: The Midnight Hour
programme.desc: Teenage Halloween pranksters Shari Belafonte-Harper LeVar Burton Lee Montgomery revive a 300-year-old witch and some of her ghoul friends

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: While in Mexico tending to a Barkley mine Heath aids a Mexican General an old family friend who escapes the wrath of an oppressive leader When it is found out that the General is living in California at the Barkley Ranch Heath is jailed - and his life is used to bargain for the Generals return

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne is escorting a bride and 5000 to his boss He meets a friend who works now for the railroad who tells Cheyenne a group of young bandits are robbing trains They strike the train but their goal is more than robbing it

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Stone and Keller suspect there is more to a string of college campus shootings than meets the eye

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The inhabitants of a replica American town are being used themselves as the unknowing carriers of a deadly plague The IM force must stop this from happening and bring the party responsible forward

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble and a female reporter capture the critically injured one-armed Fred Johnson and try to get him to confess to the murder of Kimbles wife

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: The Barkleys refuse to cooperate with the Mexican authorities but with the Generals help plan to go to Rio Blanco Mexico and break Heath out of jail Meanwhile Heath has his own break-out plan and succeeds-but is betrayed

programme.title: Prophecy
programme.desc: A government health inspector is dispatched to assess the damage a logging company is causing to a patch of forest claimed by Native Americans and comes face to face with true terror wreaking havoc in the woods

programme.title: Tarantulas The Deadly Cargo
programme.desc: Townsfolk unite against spiders freed from a crashed planes coffee-bean cargo

programme.title: Day of the Dead
programme.desc: Trapped in a missile silo a small team of scientists civilians and trigger-happy soldiers battle desperately to ensure the survival of the human race but tension inside the base is reaching breaking-point and the zombies are gathering outside

programme.title: Theater of Blood
programme.desc: A Shakespearean actor takes poetic revenge on the critics who denied him recognition

programme.title: City of the Living Dead
programme.desc: A psychic and a journalist head to Dunvich to prevent an apocalypse after a priest commits suicide in a cemetery somehow causing the gates of hell to open and allowing the dead to rise

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Dalgiev Khamzat v. Dragan Pesic

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: The K Victoria Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: Sherard sits down with Carribbean superstar K Victoria Hear how shes changing the world with her music

programme.desc: Sherard sits down with the man who has turn comedy into an art

programme.title: The Heart Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the beautiful actress Heart Hayes Hear how keeping her standards high is the only option Also in the episode I chat it up with former Supreme Susaye Green And Businessman Mr Johnboy Watts

programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina
